At 2s, the sticker is confirmed as the target because its text reads "Mahalo my dude," and at 3s that same sticker is still visible and still reads "Mahalo my dude."
At 4s, the visible sticker reads "LOLLY POP PARK," which is identified as a different sticker, so the target "Mahalo my dude" sticker's last on-screen physical appearance is the one at 3s.
In that last confirmed target frame at 3s, the "Mahalo my dude" sticker text is yellow. Among the options, this maps to E. Yellow.
